保护隐私 protect privacy ©隐私侵犯 Privacy Violations. 科技的高速发展使得个人信

提高效率 enhance efficiency 息更容易被收集和和滥用，威胁个人隐私安全。The rapid

解决安全问题 address security issues development of technology makes personal information

分析数据 analyze data more susceptible to collection and misuse, threatening

利用技术 leverage technology personal privacy and security.

实现自动化 achieve automation @失业问题 Unemployment Issues. 自动化和智能化可能导

分享信息 share information 致某些行业的工作岗位减少,增加失业率.Automation and

建立连接 establish connections intelligent systems may lead to job losses in certain

遵守法规 comply with regulations industries, increasing unemployment rates.

提供教育 provide education @#24 Social lsolation。过度依赖科技产品可能削弱人

创建内容 create content 际交往，导致社交隔半和孤独感。Over-reliance on

推广应用 promote applications technological devices can weaken interpersonal

提升技能 enhance skills interactions, leading to social isolation and feelings of

优化系统 optimize systems loneliness.

保护数据 protect data

2. 社交媒体的影响 六“积极影响 人 GD 信息获取。互联网极大地丰富了信息资源，使人们能够快速获取所需信息。The internet greatly enriches information resources, enabling people to quickly obtain the information they need

Q 沟通便利。互联网提供了多种沟通工具，如电子邮件、社交媒体，让人与人之间的交流更加便捷。 The internet offers various communication tools, such as email and social media, making communication between people more convenient.

@远程教育。网络教育打破了地理限制，为不同地区的人提供了学习机会(可以衔接教育里面的论 证).Online education breaks geographical limitations, providing learning opportunities for people in different regions. 六”消极影响

@隐私泄露 Privacy Breach。互联网上个人信息容易泄露，给个人隐私带来风险。Personal information on the internet is susceptible to breaches, posing risks to personal privacy. Cyber threats and viruses pose risks to both individuals and businesses.

@4%.&it& Information Overload。互联网信息量巨大，可能导致信息过载，使人难以筛选出有价 值的信息。The vast amount of information on the internet can lead to information overload, making it difficult for people to filter valuable information.

影响人际关系的建立.Online communication may reduce face-to-face social activities, affecting the establishment of interpersonal relationships.

3. 纸笔对比电子的优点

OQ 传统习惯。纸笔作为传统的书写工具，对许多人来说更符合习惯，易于使用。Pen and paper, as traditional writing tools, are more in line with habits and easy to use for many people

QD 减少干扰.使用纸笔书写时,人们通常不会被通知.广告或其他数字干扰所打扰.When writing with pen and paper, people are generally not disturbed by notifications, advertisements, or other digital distractions.

@手写记忆 Handwriting Memory。研究表明，手写笔记可能有助于加深记忆和理解，因为手写过 程本身是一种积极的学习方式。Studies suggest that handwriting notes may help deepen memory and understanding, as the process of handwriting itself is an active way of learning.

论证语料

4. AI 的影响和意义 六积极影响

DQ 提升生产效率。Al 自动化能够大幅提高各行业的工作效率，制造业使用 Al 机器人(如特斯拉工 厂)可 24 小时不间断生产，减少人为错误，提高产量。Al automation significantly improves efficiency across industries. For example, Al robots in manufacturing like Tesla factories can enable 24/7 production with fewer human errors. Al 自动化一任务快速精准完成一企业成本 降低一经济增长

Q 改善日常生活。Al 助手和智能设备的存在可以让生活更便捷，例如语音助手可以帮助我们智能控 制家居、安排日程等，大大提升我们的灵活性。The presence of Al assistants and smart devices can make life easier, for example, voice assistants can help us intelligently control our homes, schedule our schedules, and so on, greatly enhancing our flexibility.

QD 促进科学研究.Al 能够加速数据分析,推动科研突破。Al 能够处理海量数据，从中发现隐藏规律， 缩短实验周期，以实现科研效率的飞跃。Al can accelerate data analysis and promote scientific research breakthroughs.Al can process massive amounts of data, discover hidden patterns from it, and shorten the experimental cycle in order to achieve a leap in scientific research efficiency. 六”消极影响 D 取代人类劳动力，导致大量工人失业，社会就业率下降，社会稳定性下降，犯罪率可能提高。The mass adoption of Al will displace the human labour force, leading to a large number of unemployed workers, a decline in employment in society, a decrease in social stability, and a possible increase in crime.+政府话题中的犯罪/失业等

@Al 依赖大数据，加剧了隐私泄露风险。公司采集的大量数据可能会被盗用或贩卖，导臻我们的个 人隐私被侵犯，会出现一些诈骗或者不良行为。Al relies on big data, exacerbating the risk of privacy breaches. The large amount of data collected by the company may be stolen or sold, leading to the violation of our personal privacy and the occurrence of some fraud or bad behaviour.

个人发展 Personal Development

常见表达和搭配 论证语料

职业发展 career development 1. 工作的意义

工作满意度 job satisfaction > RE

工作与生活平衡 work-life balance OQ 经济发展。工作是推动经济增长和社会繁荣的基础通，过

消费文化 consumer culture 创造财富和提供服务促进社会发展.Work is the foundation

工作伦理 work ethics for economic growth and social prosperity，promoting

消费行为 consumer behavior social development by creating wealth and providing

职业规划 career planning Services.

消费心理 consumer psychology Q 社会稳定。稳定的就业有助于维持社会秩序，减少社会巴

工作稳定性 job stability 盾和冲突。Stable employment helps maintain social order

消费趋势 consumer trends and reduce social conflicts and contradictions.

工作机会 job opportunities @@科技进步。工作场所是创新和科技发展的重要平台，员工

消费模式 consumer patterns 通过工作贡献智丰和力量。The workplace is an important

工作条件 working conditions platform for innovation and technological development,

工作动力 work motivation strength through work.

消费过剩 overconsumption OD 文化传承。工作是文化和知识传承的重要途径，通过职业

消费意识 consumer awareness 活动将社会经验和技能传递给下一代。Work is an

职业晋升 career advancement important way to inherit culture and knowledge, passing

消费主义批判 critique of consumerism on social experience and skills to the next generation

工作满意度 job satisfaction through professional activities.

追求职业 pursue a career > BRA

提高满意度 enhance satisfaction Q 经济独立。工作为个人提供收入来源，帮助实现经济独立

平衡工作与生活 balance work and life 和生活质量的提升。VWork provides a source of income for

促进消费 promote consumption individuals, helping to achieve financial independence

选择职业 choose a career and improve the quality of life.

影响消费行为 influence consumer behavior Q 自我实现。工作是实现个人价值和社会地位的途径，通过

规划职业 plan a career 职业成就获得满足感和成就感。Work is a way to realize

塑造消费心理 shape consumer psychology personal value and social status，gaining a sense of

提供工作机会 provide job opportunities satisfaction and achievement through professional

预测消费趋势 predict consumer trends accomplishments.

改善工作条件 improve working conditions @@技能提升。工作中不断学习和实践，有助于个人技能和专

应对消费压力 cope with consumer pressure 业素养的持续提升。Continuous learning and practice in

培养工作价值观 cultivate work values the workplace contribute to the continuous improvement

引导消费引导 consumer guidance of personal skills and professional qualities.

获得职业晋升 achieve career advancement ®D 社交网络。工作环境是建立社交关系的重要场所，有助于

批判消费主义 critique consumerism 拓展人脉和社交图。The work environment is an important

评估工作满意度 assess job satisfaction place to build social relationships, helping to expand

提高消费意识 raise consumer awareness one's social network and circle of friends.

接受职业培训 receive vocational training 做出职业选择 make a career choice 设定消费限制 set consumer restrictions 展现工作态度 show work attitude

论证语料

2. 工作环境的影响

> Pty

OQ 高效率。严肃的工作环境通常要求严格的纪律和规范，有助于提高工作效率。Aformal work environment usually requires strict discipline and standards, which helps to improve work efficiency.

Q 专业形象。这种环境有助于塑造专业、严说的工作氛围，对内外部形象有正面影响。Such an environment helps to create a professional and rigorous atmosphere, positively affecting both internal and external image GD) 明确责任。明确的等级制度和责任分工可以减少职责不清和混乱。A clear hierarchy and division of responsibilities can reduce ambiguity and confusion

QD 创新受限.过于严肃的环境可能抑制员工的创造性思维和自由表达.An overly formal environment may suppress creative thinking and free expression among employees ©压力较大。高压和严格的规定可能给员工带来较大的心理压力。High pressure and strict regulations can bring significant psychological stress to employees ©可能造成员工间的距离感，影响团队的凝聚力。It may create a sense of distance among employees, affecting team cohesion.

> Amey

©创新鼓励。自由的工作环境鼓励员工创新和尝试新的想法。A casual work environment encourages employees to innovate and try out new ideas.

QD 工作满足感。灵活的工作安排和告适的环境可以提高员工的工作满意度。Flexible work arrangements and a comfortable setting can increase job satisfaction among employees.

@团队合作。促进员工间的交流合作，增强团队协作精神。It promotes communication and cooperation among employees, enhancing team spirit. 全过于自由可能导致纪律松懈，影响工作的规范性和系统性。Too casual an environment may lead to a lack of discipline, affecting the norms and systematic approach to work ©自由环境可能使一些员工分心，影响工作效率。A casual environment may distract some employees, affecting work efficiency. ©对于管理者来说,如何在自由与秩序之间找到平衡是一个挑战。For managers, finding a balance between freedom and order is a challenge.

3. 机器人对社会的影响

> PE

OQ 提高生产力。机器人能够承担重复性和高强度的工作，显著提高生产力。Robots can undertake repetitive and high-intensity tasks, significantly improving productivity.

Q 精确性高。机器人在执行任务时的精确度远高于人类，特别是在精密制造和手术等领域。Robots perform tasks with a precision that far exceeds human capabilities，especially in fields like precision manufacturing and surgery.

@安全性增强。机器人可以从事危险工作，如灾难救援、高辐射环境作业，保护人类安全。Robots can engage in dangerous work, such as disaster relief and operations in high-radiation environments, protecting human safety.

> WR

DQ 就业问题。自动化可能导致某些工作岗位的消失，引发就业问题和职业转型的挑战。lead to the disappearance of certain job positions, raising challenges of employment and career transition.

QD 依赖性增加。人类可能过度依赖机器人和自动化技术，影响自身的技能和能力发展。overly reliant on robots

4. 消费主义的利弊

> RR

O 经济增长。消费主义推动消费，有助于经济增长和繁荣 Consumerism drives consumption, contributing to economic growth and prosperity.

Q 消费需求促进企业创新，推出新产品和技术。同时能够促进产业发展，增加就业机会。Consumer demand encourages businesses to innovate and introduce new products and technologies. promotes industry development, increasing job opportunities.

QQ 消费主义鼓励追求更好的生活品质,提升个人幸福感。Consumerism encourages the pursuit of a better quality of life and enhances personal well-being

> Hw

QD 过度消费可能导致资源浪费和环境破坏。excessive consumption can lead to resource waste and environmental destruction.

QD 盲目追求消费可能导致经济泡沫和不稳定，也可能加剧贫富差距和社会不平等。Blind pursuit of consumption may lead to economic bubbles and instability. Consumerism may exacerbate wealth disparity and social inequality.

@过度消费可能导致个人债务累积，影响经济安全。Excessive consumption can lead to the accumulation of personal debt, affecting financial security.

®价值观捏曲 Value Distortion. 消费主义可能导致物质主义至上的价值观，忽视非物质的价 值。Consumerism may lead to a materialistic value system, neglecting non-material values.

5. 工作和家庭的取舍 六“工作的重要性〈(见上)

> FRHTZR

O 情感依托。家庭提供情感支持和归属感，是精神慰藉的港湾。Family provides emotional support and a sense of belonging, serving as a haven for spiritual comfort

@@身心健康。和谐的家庭生活有助于个人的身心健康。。家庭生活可以平衡工作压力，提供放松和 恢复精力的空间。A harmonious family life contributes to an individual's physical and mental well-being. Family life can balance the pressures of work, providing a space for relaxation and rejuvenation.

> RAR

OQ 压力管理。来自工作和家许的压力需要有效管理,viii Rit ZRF. The pressures from work and family need to be managed effectively to avoid burnout.

Q 优先级确定。个人需要根据自己的价值观和生活目标确定工作和家庭的优先级.Individuals need to determine the priority of work and family based on their values and life goals

@支持系统。建立有效的支持系统，如家庭、朋友和社区资源。 Establishing effective support systems, such as family, friends, and community, helps to cope with the challenges of work and family.

城市生活 City

常见表达和搭配 论证语料

城市化 urbanization 1. 城市化的优缺点

城市规划 urban planning > 优点

城市绿化 urban greening OQ 城市化促进了工商业的集中，有助于经济的规模化和现代

提供城市基础设施 provide urban 化。Urbanization promotes the concentration of industry infrastructure and commerce, contributing to economic scaling and

应对城市扩张 cope with urban sprawl modernization

食品安全 food safety Q 基础设施完善。城市提供了更加完善的基础设施，如交通、

食品质量 food quality 医疗、教育等 Cities provide more comprehensive

食品浪费 food waste infrastructure such as transportation，healthcare，and

食品供应链 food supply chain education

食品加工 food processing @@就业机会。城市提供更多的就业机会和职业选择。Cities

食品多样性 food diversity offer more employment opportunities and career choices.

有机食品 organic food ®Q 教育资源。城市通常拥有更丰富的教育资源和更高水平的

保护城市环境 protect the urban environment 学校，且居民可以享受到更丰富的文化生活和艺术活动。

提供食品教育 provide food education Cities typically have richer educational resources and

制定食品政策 formulate food policies higher-level schools. Urban residents can enjoy a richer

建设城市社区 build urban communities cultural life and artistic activities.

设计城市景观 design urban landscapes

制定食品法规 establish food regulations > RR

选择有机食品 choose organic food

解决城市住房问题 address urban housing 题，可能对个人健康构成挑战。Urbanization can be issues accompanied by issues like air, water, and noise pollution.

Q 居住成本。城市生活成本相对较高，特别是住房成本。The cost of living in cities is relatively high, especially housing costs.

@交通拥堵。Traffic congestion is a common issue due to dense urban populations.

QQ 生活压力。城市生活节奏快，况争压力大，可能增加个人 的生活压力。The fast pace of city life and competitive pressure may increase individual stress.

@人际关系疏离。 Relationships between people in cities may be more distant.

论证语料

2. 农村生活的优缺点 (Rural life)

> RH

① RAHA iH aH Ze FAY A AIRE. Rural areas usually have fresh air and a peaceful natural environment.

QD 生活成本低。农村的生活成本相对较低，房价和物价更为合理。The cost of living in rural areas is relatively low, with more reasonable housing prices and prices

@社区关系紧密 Close-knit community relationships。农村社区通常关系紧密，和邻里之间互动频繁。 Rural communities are often closely related, with frequent interactions among neighbors

> EF

OQ 就业机会有限。农村地区的就业机会相对较少，职业选择有限。There are relatively fewer job opportunities in rural areas, with limited career choices.

QD 基础设施不足。农村地区的基础设施可能不如城市发过，如医疗、教育和交通。Infrastructure in rural areas may not be as developed as in cities, such as medical care, education, and transportation.

@生活设施不便。农村地区的购物、娱乐等设施可能不如城市便利。Shopping and entertainment facilities in rural areas may not be as convenient as in cities.

3. 房屋紧张问题

> AA

DQ 城市化进程人口增长。随着城市化加速，越来越多的人迁移到城市寻求更好的工作和生活机会。 The acceleration of urbanization brings more people to cities in search of better life and work opportunities.

Q 土地资源有限.可用于建设的土地资源有限,尤其在一些地价昂贵的地区.There is a finite amount of land available for construction, especially in areas with high land prices.

OQ 投资和投机行为。房地产市场的投资和投机行为可能推高房价，造成房屋紧张。Investment and speculative activities in the real estate market can drive up housing prices, resulting in housing tension.

> RAR

(CD 增加住房供应。政府可以通过政策鼓励增加住房建设,提高供应量.Governments can encourage housing construction through policies to increase the supply.

QD 优化城市规划。合理规划城市空间，提高土地使效率用。Plan urban spaces reasonably and improve land use efficiency.

@住房补贴政策 Housing Subsidy Policies。为低收入群体提供住房补贴或公租房，缓解住房压 力。Provide housing subsidies or public rental housing for low-income groups to alleviate housing pressure.

@抑制投机行为 Curb Speculative Behavior。 Curb Speculative Behavior

4. 城市绿化和公园

> BAR

DQ 改善空气质量.城市绿化和公园能够吸收空气中的有害物质,释放氧气,为城市居民提供清新的空气.Urban greening and parks can absorb harmful substances from the air and release oxygen, providing fresh air for city residents.

QD 提供休闲空间。城市公园为居民提供了休闲、运动和社交的场所，增进身心健康。Urban parks provide spaces for residents to relax, exercise, and socialize, enhancing physical and mental well-being.

@)保护生物多样性。城市绿化有助于保护和增加城市中的生物多样性，为野生动植物提供栖息地。Urban greening helps protect and increase biodiversity within the city, providing habitats for wildlife. >

@®资源分配不均 Uneven Resource Allocation。如果城市绿化和公园建设过度，可能会占用本可以用于其他 公共服务或基础设施的资金和资源。If urban greening and park construction are excessive, they may occupy funds and resources that could have been used for other public services or infrastructure.

@484 RAB High Maintenance Costs. 大面积的绿地和公园需要持续的维护和管理,这会带来昂贵的经 济负担。Large areas of green spaces and parks require ongoing maintenance and management, which can bring a heavy economic burden.

@水资源消耗在干旱地区,过度绿化可能导致大量水资源的消耗,影响水资源的可持续利用.In arid regions, excessive greening may lead to significant water consumption, affecting the sustainable use of water resources.

5. 食品安全问题

> 成因

(CD 农业生产环境污染:工业和城市废弃物的排放导致土壤和水源污染，影响农作物和畜牧产品的质量。The discharge of industrial and urban waste leads to soil and water source contamination, affecting the quality of crops and livestock products.

@企业道德风险 Ethical Risks: Some companies may sacrifice food safety and quality standards in the pursuit of maximizing profits

@食品加工违规行为 Food Processing Violations: 一些食品加工企业为降低成本或提升产品外观，违规使 用添加剂、抗生素和激素。Some food processing companies may use additives, antibiotics, and hormones improperly to reduce costs or enhance product appearance.

> te

@加强立法与监管 Strengthen Legislation and Regulation。制定严格的食品安全法规，加大监管力度，确保 食品生产、加工、销售各环节符合安全标准。Formulate strict food safety laws and regulations, and increase supervision to ensure that all stages of food production, processing, and sales meet safety standards.

@提高行业准入门槛 Raise Industry Entry Barriers。对食品生产企业实施更为严格的资质审查，确保只有符 合安全标准的企业才能进入市场。Implement stricter qualification reviews for food production enterprises to ensure that only enterprises that meet safety standards can enter the market.

G@) 消费者权益保护 Consumer Rights Protection。加强消费者权益保护，对食品安全事故中的受害者提供法 律援助和赔偿。Strengthen the protection of consumer rights, providing legal assistance and compensation to victims of food safety incidents

媒体类 Media

论证语料

1. 新闻媒体的存在意义和影响

媒体的可靠性

① 新闻媒体能够帮助公众了解世界，提高知识水平。新闻报道涵盖政治、科技、健康等话题(如 COVID-19 防疫指南)，帮助人们做出明智决策。News media informs the public about global events, enhancing knowledge. Coverage of topics like politics, technology, and health (e.g., COVID-19 guidelines) enables informed decision-making. 媒体报道一公众获取信息一知识增长一社会参与度提高

② 媒体会揭露腐败与不公，从而推动社会正义的延续。调查记者揭发政府或企业丑闻促使法律与政策改进。 Media exposes corruption and injustice, driving social reform. Investigative journalism can lead to legal and policy changes. 媒体监督一曝光问题一公众压力一制度完善

③ 在自然灾害或突发事件中媒体往往能提供关键救命指导。比如台风预警、地震逃生指南等实时信息可挽救 生命。During disasters or emergencies, media offers vital life-saving guidance. 快速传播信息一公众及时行动一减少伤亡与损失

④ 媒体的存在打破了地域限制，能够增进全球跨文化理解。Media bridges geographical gaps, fostering cultural awareness. 多元内容传播 Diverse content> 文化认知提升 Cultural awareness 一社会包容性增强 social tolerance

> 新闻媒体的弊端

① 过度报道负面新闻会引发公众恐慌和心理压力。Excessive coverage of negative news triggers public panic and stress. 聚焦负面事件一放大威胁感知 Amplified threat perception> 48/8/4478 anxiety/depression

② 假新闻和片面报道回捏曲事实,误导公众判断.Fake news and biased reporting distort truth and misguide judgment.

③ 碎片化新闻消费损害深度思考能力。Fragmented news consumption harms deep thinking. “标题党”和短视频新闻让人习惯浅层阅读，丧失逻辑分析习惯。Clickbait headlines or short videos cultivate shallow reading habits.
